service.name: OpenAI Whisper API
service.description_for_ai: OpenAI Whisper API — state-of-the-art speech recognition in 50+ languages. Near-human accuracy even with accents, background noise, and technical terms. Transcribe or translate audio files up to 25MB. $0.006/minute. Supports SRT/VTT subtitle output. Best STT accuracy available via API.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transcribe audio to text with near-human accuracy in 50+ languages. Handles accents, background noise, and technical terminology.

file.description: Audio file: mp3, mp4, mpeg, mpga, m4a, wav, webm. Max 25MB. For larger files compress to mp3 first.

model.description: Always 'whisper-1' — the only available Whisper model via API

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code: en, ru, de, fr, es, zh, ja, ar, etc. Auto-detected if omitted — but specifying improves accuracy.

prompt.description: Context hint to improve accuracy: technical terms, proper nouns, or speaking style. E.g. 'Meeting about Kubernetes deployment'

response_format.description: json (default), text (plain string), srt (subtitles), vtt (WebVTT), verbose_json (with timestamps)

temperature.description: Sampling temperature 0-1. Higher = more creative guesses for unclear audio.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Transcribe audio in any language and translate to English simultaneously. Useful for multilingual audio content.

file.description: Audio file in any supported language

prompt.description: English text prompt to guide translation style

response_format.description: json, text, srt, vtt, or verbose_json
